title: Use of English – 2024 – Acceso Titular B

questions.prompt: When hanging out with your friends, avoid ... junk food.
answers: buying

questions.prompt: At 9 p.m. tomorrow I ... over Cambridge.
answers: will be flying

questions.prompt: There is ... noise in the classroom.
Lisa came ... a gold ring in the sand.
Will Ed Sheeran’s new album be released soon?
answers: Will they release Ed Sheeran’s new album soon

questions.prompt: You may see dolphins in this area if the sea is calm.
answers: Dolphins may be seen in this area if the sea is calm

questions.prompt: The museum is just two miles from here.
questions.instruction: Give a question for the underlined words.
answers: How far is the museum from here
How far from here is the museum

questions.prompt: Ann’s favourite dish is chicken Tikka Masala. She buys it at the local shop.
answers: Ann’s favourite dish is chicken Tikka Masala, which she buys at the local shop
Ann’s favourite dish, which she buys at the local shop, is chicken Tikka Masala

questions.prompt: The podcast was so fascinating that I couldn’t stop listening to it.
answers: It was such a fascinating podcast that I couldn’t stop listening to it
It was such a fascinating podcast that I could not stop listening to it

questions.prompt: My mother got promoted last month, since...

manualCorrection.structure: subject + present simple / present perfect / past simple / past perfect

questions.prompt: I’m not used to speak in public, but I'm getting better in it.
questions.instruction: Find the mistakes and rewrite correctly.
answers: I’m not used to speaking in public, but I’m getting better at it
I am not used to speaking in public, but I am getting better at it

questions.prompt: My colleague asked me to postpone our meeting.
answers: Could we postpone our meeting, please
Can we postpone our meeting, please
Could you postpone our meeting, please
Can you postpone our meeting, please
Postpone our meeting, please

questions.prompt: 'If you have any problems with the heater, you can call me tonight,' the landlord told Sally.
answers: The landlord told Sally that if she had any problems with the heater, she could call him that night
The landlord said to Sally that if she had any problems with the heater, she could call him that night

questions.prompt: Use the words in the boxes to make a meaningful sentence. Use all and only the words in the boxes without changing their form.
questions.instruction: Words: is / deadline / to / established / the / he / miss / likely
answers: He is likely to miss the established deadline
He's likely to miss the established deadline
He has likely to miss the established deadline
